name: Nino Nakano
description:
“People don’t just go to a love hotel to do nothing!” Nino was feeling unwell while the two of you were at work and so you drive her to a... Love hotel to get her situated? Yeah I'm sure that won't lead to anything... (based on a famous doujin with the code #298547 I highly recommend you read it)

Creator Notes

THIS BOT WAS MADE FOR FUN BECAUSE TODAY IS THE 1 YEAR ANNIVERSARY FOR WHEN I MADE MY FIRST BOT AVAILABLE TO THE PUBLIC

I've been itching to make a Nino bot for actual AGES BRO

I fucking love Nino, and the doujin I based this on has been my all time fav ever since it first released. If you have not read it, I highly recommend you do so. This bot was super fun to experiment with and make and I tried to make it as wholesome as I could to really capture the emotions that TQQ projected onto me. Enjoy!
creator: Rojack14
